message.content:
@startuml
actor User

participant CellEditor
participant Address
participant Controller
participant Cell
participant CellImpl
participant FormulaCompiler
participant ExcelExpressionCompiler
participant ANTLRStringStream
participant FormulaLexer
participant CommonTokenStream
participant FormulaParser
participant Expression
participant Formula

note over User, CellEditor : Inputs block of instructions

User -> CellEditor : address = getAddress()
User -> CellEditor : cell = getCell(address)
CellEditor -> Controller : setContent(content)
User -> Controller : setContent(content)
Controller -> CellImpl : setContent(content)
CellImpl -> CellImpl : storeContent(content)
CellImpl -> FormulaCompiler : compile(cell, content)
FormulaCompiler -> ExcelExpressionCompiler : compile(cell, content)
ExcelExpressionCompiler -> ANTLRStringStream : input = create(source)
ANTLRStringStream --> ExcelExpressionCompiler
ExcelExpressionCompiler -> FormulaLexer : lexer = create(input)
FormulaLexer --> ExcelExpressionCompiler
ExcelExpressionCompiler -> CommonTokenStream : tokens = create(lexer)
CommonTokenStream --> ExcelExpressionCompiler
ExcelExpressionCompiler -> FormulaParser : parser = create(tokens)
FormulaParser --> ExcelExpressionCompiler
ExcelExpressionCompiler -> FormulaParser : tree = parser.expression()
FormulaParser --> ExcelExpressionCompiler
ExcelExpressionCompiler -> Expression : create()
Expression --> ExcelExpressionCompiler
ExcelExpressionCompiler -> Expression : expression = convert(cell, tree)
Expression --> ExcelExpressionCompiler
ExcelExpressionCompiler --> FormulaCompiler : expression
FormulaCompiler -> Formula : formula = create(cell, expression)
Formula --> FormulaCompiler
FormulaCompiler --> CellImpl : formula
CellImpl -> CellEditor : show()

note over User : Result
User <- CellEditor

@enduml
